# Metechi Public Site

Metechi is a public product site for polished mobile products. The active public lineup is CoachPad and Infinite Flux.

## Site Facts
- Name: Metechi
- URL: https://www.metechi.dev/
- Contact: info@metechi.dev
- Last updated: 2026-06-25
- Public products: CoachPad, Infinite Flux

## Public Pages
- https://www.metechi.dev/ - Premium Metechi homepage.
- https://www.metechi.dev/coachpad.html - CoachPad tactical board product page.
- https://www.metechi.dev/infinite-flux.html - Infinite Flux reflex runner product page.
- https://www.metechi.dev/privacy.html - Metechi website privacy overview.
- https://www.metechi.dev/coachpad-privacy.html - CoachPad privacy policy.
- https://www.metechi.dev/infinite-flux-privacy.html - Infinite Flux privacy policy.

## Products
- CoachPad helps coaches design formations, animate tactical sequences, plan drills, and share ideas with players or staff. Public Google Play and App Store links are available from its product page.
- Infinite Flux is a mobile reflex runner focused on lane switching, focus energy, shard collection, streak scoring, objectives, and upgrades.
